mapper.sql: MM.id , MM.rep_name , KI.detail_json::text AS kdata , HI.detail_json::text AS hdata , EI.detail_json::text AS edata
mapper.select:
/* com.erns.es.coching.mapper.EsIngredientDAO.getListCountForRawMapping */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_es_ingd_map MM LEFT OUTER JOIN t_es_kcai_ingd KI ON MM.raw_kcai_id = KI.id LEFT OUTER JOIN t_es_hw_ingd HI ON MM.raw_hw_ingd_id = Hi.id LEFT OUTER JOIN t_es_ewg_ingd EI ON MM.raw_ewg_id = EI.id

/* com.erns.es.coching.mapper.EsIngredientDAO.loadRawMapping */
SELECT
FROM t_es_ingd_map MM LEFT OUTER JOIN t_es_kcai_ingd KI ON MM.raw_kcai_id = KI.id LEFT OUTER JOIN t_es_hw_ingd HI ON MM.raw_hw_ingd_id = Hi.id LEFT OUTER JOIN t_es_ewg_ingd EI ON MM.raw_ewg_id = EI.id
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0
